title: Interest on this VC
description: The Rose Valley is a region located on the southern slopes of the Central Stara Planina. It is famous for the local rose-growing industry and the distillation of rose oil. The region is also a centre for the production of other essential oils, including those from species collected or cultivated in the nearby mountains. Specialist companies in the locality - and elsehwere in Bulgaria - produce a range of cosmetic products using oils from the mountain species.
